_metadata.description: ARAH G.I. Joe team vehicles from the original 3.75" A Real American Hero toyline (1982-1994). Includes all named Joe faction vehicles, playsets, sub-team repaints, and mail-order exclusives.

uncertain_items.name: Missile Command Headquarters
uncertain_items.reason: 1982 playset — may be classified as a playset rather than a vehicle. Included for completeness.

uncertain_items.name: Headquarters Command Center
uncertain_items.reason: 1983 playset — large fold-out base. Included as a vehicle/playset per precedent.

uncertain_items.name: PAC/RATs (Flame Thrower, Machine Gun, Missile Launcher)
uncertain_items.reason: 1983 motorized weapon platforms — borderline between accessories and vehicles. Excluded as they are closer to weapon emplacements than vehicles.

uncertain_items.name: Battle Stations (Bivouac, Mountain Howitzer, Watch Tower, Air Defense, Check Point)
uncertain_items.reason: 1984-1985 small battle stations — classified as accessories/emplacements, not vehicles. Excluded.

uncertain_items.name: Battlefield Accessories (Machine Gun/Missile/Mortar Defense Units, Ammo Dump, Forward Observer, Rifle Range)
uncertain_items.reason: 1984-1985 small accessory sets — not vehicles. Excluded.

uncertain_items.name: Motorized Action Packs (1988 Mine Sweeper, Mortar Launcher, Double Machine Gun)
uncertain_items.reason: 1988 small motorized weapon accessories — borderline. Excluded as accessories.

uncertain_items.name: Motorized Vehicle Packs (1988 ATV, Scuba Pack, Tank Car)
uncertain_items.reason: 1988 small motorized vehicle accessories — borderline. Excluded as too small to be named vehicles.

uncertain_items.name: S.N.A.K.E. Armor
uncertain_items.reason: 1985 one-man battle armor — borderline between vehicle and wearable armor. Excluded.

uncertain_items.name: Bomb Disposal / Weapon Transport
uncertain_items.reason: 1985 small utility vehicles — borderline between accessories and vehicles. Excluded.

uncertain_items.name: C.A.T. (Crimson Attack Tank)
uncertain_items.reason: 1985 Sears exclusive — MOBAT repaint in Crimson Guard colors. Technically a Crimson Guard vehicle, faction is ambiguous (Cobra-aligned). Excluded from Joe vehicles.

uncertain_items.name: S.M.S. (Sentry and Missile System)
uncertain_items.reason: 1985 Sears exclusive — HISS/MMS repaint in Crimson Guard colors. Cobra-aligned. Excluded from Joe vehicles.

uncertain_items.name: Gears (Star Brigade Power Fighter pilot)
uncertain_items.reason: Gears character does not have an entry in arah-gi-joe-characters.json. component_slugs left empty.

uncertain_items.name: Red Ninja (Battle Ax pilot)
uncertain_items.reason: Red Ninja character does not have an entry in arah-gi-joe-characters.json. Battle Ax excluded — it is a Cobra Ninja Force vehicle.

characters.name: F.L.A.K.
characters.notes: F.L.A.K. (Field Light Attack Cannon). Mobile anti-aircraft cannon with swivel and elevating barrel. First released 1982. No packaged figure.

characters.name: H.A.L.
characters.notes: H.A.L. (Heavy Artillery Laser). Swivel and elevating laser cannon platform. First released 1982. Packaged with Grand Slam.

characters.name: J.U.M.P.
characters.notes: J.U.M.P. (Jet Mobile Propulsion Unit). Jet pack with launch pad and command console. First released 1982. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Missile Command Headquarters
characters.notes: Missile Command Headquarters playset. Fold-out mobile command center with missile launchers. First released 1982. No packaged figure.

characters.name: M.M.S.
characters.notes: M.M.S. (Mobile Missile System). Tracked mobile missile launcher. First released 1982. No packaged figure.

characters.name: M.O.B.A.T.
characters.notes: M.O.B.A.T. (Motorized Battle Tank). Motorized tank with rotating turret and extending battle cannon. First released 1982. Packaged with Steeler.

characters.name: R.A.M.
characters.notes: R.A.M. (Rapid Fire Motorcycle). Motorcycle with Vulcan gatling cannon and saddlebags. First released 1982. No packaged figure.

characters.name: V.A.M.P.
characters.notes: V.A.M.P. (Vehicle: Attack, Multi-Purpose). 4x4 attack jeep with twin .50 caliber machine guns. First released 1982. Packaged with Clutch.

characters.name: A.P.C.
characters.notes: A.P.C. (Amphibious Personnel Carrier). Multi-terrain troop transport with removable top and cannon. First released 1983. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Dragonfly XH-1
characters.notes: Dragonfly XH-1 Assault Copter. Twin-engine attack helicopter with dual gun turrets. First released 1983. Packaged with Wild Bill.

characters.name: Falcon Glider
characters.notes: Falcon assault glider. Lightweight unpowered attack glider. First released 1983. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Headquarters Command Center
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Headquarters Command Center. Large fold-out base playset with multiple levels and defense positions. First released 1983. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Skystriker XP-14F
characters.notes: Skystriker XP-14F Combat Jet. Supersonic fighter jet based on the F-14 Tomcat. First released 1983. Packaged with Ace.

characters.name: Twin Battle Gun
characters.notes: Twin Battle Gun. Dual-barrel mobile gun emplacement. First released 1983. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Wolverine
characters.notes: Wolverine Armored Missile Vehicle. Tread-driven missile tank. First released 1983. Packaged with Cover Girl.

characters.name: Killer W.H.A.L.E.
characters.notes: Killer W.H.A.L.E. (Warrior Hovering Assault Launch Envoy). Large armed hovercraft. First released 1984. Packaged with Cutter.

characters.name: MANTA
characters.notes: MANTA windsurfer vehicle. Mail-order exclusive sailboard vehicle never sold at retail. First released 1984. No packaged figure.

characters.name: S.H.A.R.C.
characters.notes: S.H.A.R.C. (Submersible High-speed Attack and Reconnaissance Craft). One-man flying submarine. First released 1984. Packaged with Deep Six.

characters.name: Sky Hawk
characters.notes: Sky Hawk VTOL (Vertical Take-Off and Landing). One-man VTOL aircraft with twin Thunderclap cannons and air-to-surface rockets. First released 1984. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Slugger
characters.notes: Slugger Self-Propelled Cannon. Armored vehicle with 170mm Howitzer cannon and removable .30 caliber machine gun. First released 1984. Packaged with Thunder.

characters.name: V.A.M.P. Mark II
characters.notes: V.A.M.P. Mark II Attack Vehicle. Upgraded VAMP with missile launcher, removable roof, and doors. First released 1984. Packaged with Clutch (v2).

characters.name: A.W.E. Striker
characters.notes: A.W.E. Striker (All Weather/Environment). 4x4 assault vehicle with mounted cannon. First released 1985. Packaged with Crankcase.

characters.name: Bridge Layer
characters.notes: Bridge Layer. Armored vehicle that deploys a portable bridge. First released 1985. Packaged with Tollbooth.

characters.name: Ferret ATV
characters.notes: Ferret ATV. Small all-terrain vehicle with missiles and cannon. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Silver Mirage
characters.notes: Silver Mirage Motorcycle. Motorcycle with sidecar gun operator seat, ground launch missiles, and mortar launcher. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Snow Cat
characters.notes: Snow Cat (Combat All-Terrain). Tracked arctic vehicle with 680 hp engine, dual Avalanche ski-missiles, room for 10 Joes. First released 1985. Packaged with Frostbite.

characters.name: Transportable Tactical Battle Platform
characters.notes: T.T.B.P. (Transportable Tactical Battle Platform). Elevated mobile platform with spotlight, crane, and command positions. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: U.S.S. Flagg
characters.notes: U.S.S. Flagg Aircraft Carrier. Massive 7.5-foot aircraft carrier playset — the largest G.I. Joe toy ever produced. First released 1985. Packaged with Keel-Haul.

characters.name: Conquest X-30
characters.notes: Conquest X-30 Supersonic Jet. Forward-swept-wing fighter jet. First released 1986. Packaged with Slip-Stream.

characters.name: Devilfish
characters.notes: Devilfish High-Speed Attack Boat. Fast attack boat with twin 110 hp jet motors, repeater cannons, torpedoes, and missiles. First released 1986. No packaged figure.

characters.name: H.A.V.O.C.
characters.notes: H.A.V.O.C. (Heavy Articulated Vehicle Ordnance Carrier). Large multi-section assault vehicle. First released 1986. Packaged with Cross-Country.

characters.name: L.C.V. Recon Sled
characters.notes: L.C.V. (Low Crawl Vehicle) Recon Sled. Small motorized recon sled with canopy and machine guns. First released 1986. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tomahawk
characters.notes: Tomahawk Troop Transport Helicopter. Large troop-carrying helicopter. First released 1986. Packaged with Lift-Ticket.

characters.name: Triple T
characters.notes: Triple T (Tag Team Terminator). Wheeled assault vehicle. First released 1986. Packaged with Sgt. Slaughter (v2).

characters.name: Buzz Boar
characters.notes: Buzz Boar. Small one-man underground boring/drilling vehicle. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Coastal Defender
characters.notes: Coastal Defender. Shore defense gun position. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Crossfire
characters.notes: Crossfire. First radio-controlled G.I. Joe vehicle with 70-foot range, 7 RC functions, scale speed over 100 mph. First released 1987. Packaged with Rumbler.

characters.name: Defiant
characters.alt_mode: Space vehicle launch complex with shuttle and gantry
characters.notes: Defiant Space Vehicle Launch Complex. Massive playset with space shuttle, crawler/gantry, and launch tower. First released 1987. Packaged with Payload and Hardtop.

characters.name: Mobile Command Center
characters.notes: Mobile Command Center (M.C.C.). Three-section mobile headquarters vehicle. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Persuader
characters.notes: Persuader High-Speed Laser Tank. 10-wheel-drive tank with Heatwave 10 Megawatt armor-piercing laser cannon and Dart SAM-37 missiles. First released 1987. Packaged with Backstop.

characters.name: Road Toad B.R.V.
characters.notes: Road Toad B.R.V. (Battlefield Recovery Vehicle). Armored tow truck / mechanic's platform. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: S.L.A.M.
characters.notes: S.L.A.M. (Strategic Long-Range Artillery Machine). Mobile long-range missile launcher. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Dominator
characters.notes: Dominator. Battle Force 2000 arctic assault tank designed for freezing weather. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Avalanche sold separately).

characters.name: Eliminator
characters.notes: Eliminator. Battle Force 2000 high-speed pursuit vehicle. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Blocker sold separately).

characters.name: Marauder
characters.notes: Marauder. Battle Force 2000 attack motorcycle/snowmobile. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Dodger sold separately).

characters.name: Sky Sweeper
characters.notes: Sky Sweeper. Battle Force 2000 anti-aircraft jet. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Maverick sold separately).

characters.name: Vector
characters.notes: Vector Jet. Battle Force 2000 advanced interceptor jet. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Knockdown sold separately).

characters.name: Vindicator
characters.notes: Vindicator. Battle Force 2000 hover assault vehicle. First released 1987. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress. No packaged figure (Blaster sold separately).

characters.name: Desert Fox 6WD
characters.notes: Desert Fox 6WD. Six-wheel-drive desert jeep with Scorpion anti-tank missiles. First released 1988. Packaged with Skidmark.

characters.name: Mean Dog
characters.notes: Mean Dog. Large multi-section attack vehicle with detachable components. First released 1988. Packaged with Wild Card.

characters.name: Phantom X-19
characters.notes: Phantom X-19 Stealth Fighter. Stealth jet based on the F-19 concept. First released 1988. Packaged with Ghostrider.

characters.name: R.P.V.
characters.notes: R.P.V. (Remote Piloted Vehicle). Unmanned drone with hydraulically operated missile rack. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Rolling Thunder
characters.notes: Rolling Thunder. Large armored mobile missile launcher. First released 1988. Packaged with Armadillo.

characters.name: Skystorm
characters.notes: Skystorm X-Wing Chopper. Helicopter with X-wing configuration, nose gun, missiles, bombs. First released 1988. Packaged with Windmill.

characters.name: Swampmasher
characters.notes: Swampmasher. 12-wheeled swamp vehicle with four tri-wheeled tracks, 4.3 liter 350 hp engine. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Warthog A.I.F.V.
characters.notes: Warthog A.I.F.V. (Amphibious Infantry Fighting Vehicle). Amphibious armored troop carrier. First released 1988. Packaged with Sgt. Slaughter (v3).

characters.name: Tiger Cat
characters.alt_mode: Tracked arctic assault vehicle (Tiger Force repaint)
characters.notes: Tiger Cat. Tiger Force repaint of the Snow Cat. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Fly
characters.notes: Tiger Fly. Tiger Force repaint of the Dragonfly XH-1 assault copter. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Paw
characters.notes: Tiger Paw. Tiger Force repaint of the Ferret ATV. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Rat
characters.notes: Tiger Rat. Tiger Force repaint of the Rattler ground attack plane. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Shark
characters.notes: Tiger Shark. Tiger Force repaint of the Cobra Water Moccasin. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Blaster
characters.notes: Night Blaster. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Cobra Maggot. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Raider
characters.notes: Night Raider. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Triple T. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Shade
characters.alt_mode: Submersible high-speed attack craft (Night Force repaint)
characters.notes: Night Shade. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the S.H.A.R.C. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Storm
characters.notes: Night Storm. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Persuader. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Striker
characters.notes: Night Striker. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Killer W.H.A.L.E. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Arctic Blast
characters.alt_mode: Arctic assault vehicle with missile launcher
characters.notes: Arctic Blast. Arctic assault vehicle. First released 1989. Packaged with Windchill.

characters.name: Crusader
characters.alt_mode: Space shuttle with Avenger scout craft
characters.notes: Crusader Space Shuttle with Avenger Scout Craft. Two-piece space vehicle set. First released 1989. Packaged with Payload (v2).

characters.name: Devastator
characters.notes: Devastator Battlefield Robot. One-man 4WD walking robot vehicle. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Mudfighter
characters.notes: Mudfighter. Ground attack aircraft. First released 1989. Packaged with Dogfight.

characters.name: Radar Rat
characters.notes: Radar Rat. Small motorized battlefield robot with radar. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Raider
characters.notes: Raider. 4-track assault vehicle. First released 1989. Packaged with Hot Seat.

characters.name: Thunderclap
characters.alt_mode: Three-section mobile assault platform with cannon
characters.notes: Thunderclap. Three-component vehicle: tractor with assault weapon, trailer with blaster cannon, and Annihilator cannon base. First released 1989. Packaged with Long Range.

characters.name: Tri-Blaster
characters.notes: Tri-Blaster. One-man 4WD battlefield robot with triple-barreled pulse fire laser cannon. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Fish
characters.notes: Tiger Fish. Tiger Force repaint of the Devilfish. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Tiger Sting
characters.notes: Tiger Sting. Tiger Force repaint of the V.A.M.P. Mark II. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Boomer
characters.notes: Night Boomer. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Skystriker. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Ray
characters.notes: Night Ray. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the Cobra Hydrofoil (Moray). First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Night Scrambler
characters.notes: Night Scrambler. Night Force (Toys R Us exclusive) repaint of the APC. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Pulverizer
characters.notes: Pulverizer. Battle Force 2000 heavy assault vehicle. First released 1989. No packaged figure (Dee-Jay sold separately).

characters.name: Equalizer
characters.notes: Equalizer. Slaughter's Marauders armored vehicle. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Lynx
characters.notes: Lynx. Slaughter's Marauders light reconnaissance vehicle. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Armadillo (Vehicle)
characters.notes: Armadillo Mini-Tank. Slaughter's Marauders light armored vehicle. First released 1989. No packaged figure. Note: also the name of the Rolling Thunder driver.

characters.name: Avalanche (Vehicle)
characters.alt_mode: Arctic assault vehicle with scout craft
characters.notes: Avalanche. Arctic assault vehicle with ice mine deployer, pulse cannon, heat-seeking missiles, and removable scout craft. First released 1990. Packaged with Cold Front.

characters.name: General
characters.alt_mode: Mobile strike headquarters with Locust mini-helicopter
characters.notes: General. Mobile strike headquarters vehicle with included Locust mini-helicopter for reconnaissance. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Hammer
characters.notes: Hammer. Armored Humvee-style vehicle with high-impact pulse cannon, rotational gun turret, and quick-slide rear hatches. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Locust
characters.notes: Locust. Small one-man attack copter/bomber with air-to-air missiles. Also included with the General. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Mobile Battle Bunker
characters.notes: Mobile Battle Bunker. Armored mobile fortress with 5,000-round laser ammo dispenser, double-barreled mortar cannons, and hidden missile rack. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Retaliator
characters.notes: Retaliator. Attack helicopter. First released 1990. Packaged with Updraft.

characters.name: Sky Havoc
characters.alt_mode: Heavy articulated vehicle (Sky Patrol chrome repaint)
characters.notes: Sky Havoc. Sky Patrol chrome repaint of the H.A.V.O.C. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Sky Hawk (Sky Patrol)
characters.alt_mode: One-man VTOL aircraft (Sky Patrol chrome repaint)
characters.notes: Sky Hawk. Sky Patrol chrome repaint of the Sky Hawk VTOL. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Sky Raven
characters.alt_mode: High-altitude reconnaissance jet (Sky Patrol chrome repaint)
characters.notes: Sky Raven. Sky Patrol chrome repaint of the Night Raven (without drone). First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Sky S.H.A.R.C.
characters.alt_mode: Submersible high-speed attack craft (Sky Patrol chrome repaint)
characters.notes: Sky S.H.A.R.C. Sky Patrol chrome repaint of the S.H.A.R.C. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Attack Cruiser
characters.notes: Attack Cruiser. River patrol boat with mines, missiles, and launchable attack glider. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Badger
characters.notes: Badger. All-track vehicle with radial tires, tow hook, and auto-fire missile launcher. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Battle Wagon
characters.notes: Battle Wagon. Motorized assault truck with detachable missile launcher and twelve missiles. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Brawler
characters.notes: Brawler. Armored vehicle with detachable grenades, missile launcher, and removable hatch cover. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Battle Copter (Joe)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Battle Copter. Pull-string powered helicopter capable of actual flight. First released 1991. Packaged with Major Altitude.

characters.name: Air Commandos Glider (Skymate)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Air Commandos Glider. Stealth assault glider. First released 1991. Packaged with Skymate.

characters.name: Air Commandos Glider (Cloudburst)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Air Commandos Glider. Stealth assault glider. First released 1991. Packaged with Cloudburst.

characters.name: Barracuda
characters.notes: Barracuda. One-man attack sub with real diving action (baking soda powered), three Shredder torpedoes, and movable stabilizer fins. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Headquarters (1992)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Headquarters. Fold-up portable base with collapsible towers, electronic battle sounds, missile launchers, removable bunker, fuel station, and movable elevator. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Patriot
characters.notes: Patriot. Armored missile launcher transport. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Storm Eagle
characters.notes: Storm Eagle A.T.F. (Advanced Tactical Fighter). Water-shooting jet with four missiles and rear landing gear. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Liquidator
characters.notes: Liquidator A.T.F. Water-shooting advanced tactical fighter jet. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Battle Copter (Ace)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Battle Copter. Pull-string powered helicopter. First released 1992. Packaged with Ace (v2).

characters.name: Air Commandos Glider (Spirit)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Air Commandos Glider. Stealth assault glider. First released 1992. Packaged with Spirit (v3).

characters.name: Eco Striker
characters.notes: Eco Striker. Eco-Warriors vehicle — water-shooting recast of the A.W.E. Striker. First released 1992. Packaged with Clean Sweep.

characters.name: Desert Apache
characters.alt_mode: Attack helicopter with electronic sounds (Sonic Fighters)
characters.notes: Desert Apache AH-74. Sonic Fighters electronic sound helicopter with 30mm chin gun and turbo-shaft thruster. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Fort America
characters.alt_mode: Transforming mobile fortress / combat tank (Sonic Fighters)
characters.notes: Fort America. Sonic Fighters electronic sound mobile fortress that transforms from combat tank into battle fortress with missile launchers. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Ghoststriker X-16
characters.notes: Ghoststriker X-16. Stealth jet fighter. First released 1993. Packaged with Ace (v3).

characters.name: Mudbuster
characters.notes: Mudbuster. All-terrain 4x4 battle truck with smash 'n bash bumper, 360-degree rotating missile launcher, and puncture-proof tires. First released 1993. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Shark 9000
characters.notes: Shark 9000. Armed assault hydroplane. First released 1993. Packaged with Cutter (v2, Battle Corps).

characters.name: Monster Blaster A.P.C.
characters.notes: Monster Blaster A.P.C. (Armored Personnel Carrier). Mega Marines heavy troop transporter with Lock 'n Load missile launcher, four heat-seeking missiles, and puncture-proof tires. First released 1993. No packaged figure (designed for Clutch v3, sold separately).

characters.name: Starfighter
characters.notes: Starfighter. Star Brigade space attack fighter with spring-fired launcher. First released 1993. Packaged with Sci-Fi.

characters.name: Armor-Bot
characters.notes: Armor-Bot. Star Brigade: Armor-Tech powered exo-armor suit. First released 1993. Packaged with Hawk (v4).

characters.name: Ninja Lightning
characters.notes: Ninja Lightning. Ninja Force motorcycle/attack cycle. First released 1993. No packaged figure (box art shows Snake Eyes).

characters.name: Pile Driver
characters.alt_mode: Ninja Force rapid-assault tornado attack vehicle
characters.notes: Pile Driver. Ninja Force Ninja Raider rapid-assault tornado attack vehicle. First released 1993. Packaged with T'Gin-Zu.

characters.name: Blockbuster
characters.notes: Blockbuster. Heavily armored vehicle with double-barreled pom-pom cannon, ten-shot auto-feeding rocket chamber, anti-aircraft gun, and front-mounted Gatling gun. First released 1994. Packaged with Windchill (v2).

characters.name: Razor-Blade
characters.notes: Razor-Blade. Helicopter that glides along a string between two handles, with figure rescue backpack. First released 1994. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Manta-Ray
characters.notes: Manta-Ray. Armed attack raft/hydrofoil. First released 1994. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Power Fighter (Joe)
characters.notes: G.I. Joe Power Fighter. Star Brigade robotic battle armor exo-suit. First released 1994. Packaged with Gears.
